name: iOS Keyboard Dismissal
description: Tests keyboard dismissal behavior on iOS: navigate to Chat tab → tap prompt field to trigger keyboard → navigate away to Models tab → navigate back to Chat tab → verify chat interface is still functional. Validates that keyboard dismissal during tab switching does not leave the chat in a broken state.

steps.description: Verify app launched with tab bar visible.
Wait for chat interface to appear.
Tap the prompt text field to trigger the keyboard (may not exist without a model loaded).
Navigate away to the Models tab (dismisses keyboard implicitly).
Wait for Models tab to render.
Navigate back to the Chat tab.
Wait for chat interface to re-render after keyboard dismissal round-trip.
Verify the chat interface is still functional after keyboard dismissal and tab switching.
